description: Classifies current registered passenger cars into economy, family, executive, performance, and exotic power tiers by kW. Use for mainstream-vs-performance fleet questions. Bounds: 1-750 kW.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | EVAL power_kw = CLAMP(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStoersteEffekt, 1, 750) | WHERE power_kw IS NOT NULL | EVAL power_tier = CASE(power_kw < 60, "Economy", power_kw < 120, "Family", power_kw < 200, "Executive", power_kw <= 400, "Performance", "Exotic") | STATS car_count = COUNT(*), avg_power_kw = AVG(power_kw) BY power_tier | SORT car_count DESC | LIMIT 10
